commands.notes: Covers release manifest, cut, and publish script behavior, including the release title mapping.
Verified the publisher will update the existing GitHub release with releaseTitle pantheon-base-v0.8.3.
Verified the live GitHub release uses tag base-v0.8.3, title pantheon-base-v0.8.3, and target commit d635044855024535487c2faba92c642c74608eec.

affectedSubgraph: release metadata -> foundation publish script -> git tag -> GitHub release record
graphChecks.notes: This change stays in release tooling and GitHub release publication, with no application runtime edits.

runtimeGap: No application runtime paths changed. Evidence is limited to release automation and GitHub release state.
knownGaps: PR-required GitHub checks still need to pass on the branch before merge because main enforces PR-only updates.
